name: GBLT Corp.
summary: GBLT Corp., through its subsidiary, German Battery Trading GMBH, operates as a diversified lighting and battery company in Germany, the United Kingdom, the rest of European Union, and internationally. The company produces and distributes residential storage systems; mobile energy storage systems; digital outdoor signs for shopping areas; wall-mounted indoor LED displays for train stations and airports; and SMD LED curtains for large events and conventions, as well as lighting products under the Polaroid brand name. It also produces and sells various types of batteries, such as lithium, alkaline, and heavy duty batteries under the AgfaPhoto brand name. In addition, the company offers LED tubes and battery chemical systems; and medical products comprising hearing aid batteries and latex gloves under private labels, as well as rechargeable batteries and chargers. It serves retail and commercial customers, as well as governments, public services, and industrial customers. The company sells its products through supermarkets, department stores, drugstores, convenience stores, petrol stations, etc. GBLT Corp. is based in Toronto, Canada.
